findings.description: create_workspace/open_workspace joined the user-supplied --name onto episodes_dir unsanitized; '../../x' or absolute names wrote the whole workspace outside episodes/. Fixed: _validate_slug rejects separators, '.', '..', empty and absolute components in both entry points; CLI-level test proves generate --name '../../escaped' fails cleanly.

The ffmpeg concat list wrapped paths in single quotes without escaping literal apostrophes, so any path like /home/O'Brien/ broke synthesis. Fixed: _concat_entry escapes ' as '\'' ; verified against real ffmpeg 6.1.

ensure_length picks the repaired transcript purely by |word_count - budget|; a degenerate near-empty repair of a heavily over-budget script can win and wipe content, surfacing later as 'no audio segments to assemble'.
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed

findings.description: openai_compat always sends response_format json_schema with strict=true, but pydantic-derived schemas lack additionalProperties:false and full 'required' lists, which OpenAI strict mode mandates — the openai provider likely 400s on structured calls (unconfirmed offline).
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed

findings.description: Reviewer flagged DEFAULT_MODELS['anthropic'] = 'claude-opus-4-8' as a fabricated model id.
findings.reason_unfixed: false positive: verified against the current Anthropic model catalog — 'claude-opus-4-8' is a valid model alias; the reviewer's model-naming knowledge was stale. No change needed.

findings.description: transcript.json is written from the raw model while script.md whitespace-normalizes turn text, so the two artifacts can differ for texts with internal newlines; only script.md is ever read back.
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed

findings.description: Host names containing newlines or the ':** ' delimiter (config-driven edge case) break or corrupt the script.md round-trip; the property test samples safe names only.
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed

findings.description: segment_key separates fields with 0x00 but allows 0x00 inside fields, so domain separation is theoretically incomplete; unreachable with realistic inputs.
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed

findings.description: No bounds on words_per_minute / pause_min_ms>pause_max_ms / calibration; zero values surface as confusing downstream errors (incl. latent ZeroDivisionError in estimated_minutes) instead of clean ConfigError.
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed

findings.description: A revoked stored GitHub token wedges the copilot provider until github-token.json is deleted manually; the token file is also chmod'ed 0600 only after being written under the default umask.
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed

findings.description: extract_json picks the first '[' or '{', so prose containing '[a link]' before the JSON yields an invalid extraction; the validate/retry loop recovers at the cost of one wasted round-trip.
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed

findings.description: Cached gap files are keyed by duration only; reusing a work dir across engines with different sample rates could concatenate mismatched silence (both current engines are 24 kHz).
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed

findings.description: TTSSettings.engine defaults to the GPU-only 'qwen3'; machines without the extra fail with a TTSError pointing at the extra instead of silently degrading.
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold; also a deliberate plan decision — the approved design names Qwen3-TTS (GPU) as the default engine with Kokoro as explicit fallback, and doctor/errors point users to `--engine kokoro`.

findings.description: Edited-away lines leave stale <hash>.wav files in segments/ forever; assembly stays correct but the cache grows unboundedly.
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed

findings.description: --name with an embedded newline/CR passes _validate_slug, creates the workspace, then breaks the ffmpeg concat list (line-based format), leaving a half-created episode; _concat_entry escapes only the quote character.
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed

findings.description: --name with an embedded NUL passes _validate_slug and Path.mkdir raises a bare ValueError that escapes the PodcastError CLI boundary as a raw traceback.
findings.reason_unfixed: below fix threshold (medium/low); logged, not fixed
